description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, build and deploy, and configure a cache for the Maven repository at .m2/. In the build stage add a build-maven job that uses the maven:3-jdk-8 Docker image, runs the command mvn clean package, and publishes the resulting target/*.jar files as artifacts. In the deploy stage add a deploy-heroku job that uses the openjdk:8 Docker image, runs apt -y update, apt install wget curl -y, installs the Heroku CLI via wget -qO- https://cli-assets.heroku.com/install-ubuntu.sh | sh, installs the heroku-cli-deploy plugin with heroku plugins:install heroku-cli-deploy, and finally deploys the jar using heroku deploy:jar target/*.jar --app tm2018-config, referencing the HEROKU_API_KEY variable for authentication.
